data.title: Crypto fraudster, with ties to $580M theft, caught in Bangkok. Lived unlawfully in Thailand since 2023, engaging in crimes.
data.description: The individual accused of scamming had been residing unlawfully in Thailand since 2023, all the while engaging in illicit activities.

data.title: Brandywine Realty Trust closes $300M offering of 6.125% notes due 2031. Company's partnership completed the public offering.
data.description: Philadelphia-based Brandywine Realty Trust revealed on October 3, 2025, that its subsidiary, Brandywine Operating Partnership, L.P., successfully completed an underwritten public offering. The offering, totaling $300 million, involved the issuance of 6.125% guaranteed notes set to mature in 2031. This financial move aimed to raise funds for the Company and bolster its operational initiatives.

data.title: Samsung and Coinbase team up to offer crypto buying on Galaxy Wallet, benefiting 75M US users, with a global launch ahead.
data.description: Samsung Wallet has partnered with Coinbase to offer simpler access to cryptocurrency for over 75 million Galaxy users in the United States. The collaboration also has plans for a worldwide expansion in the future, aiming to bring the initiative to a much larger user base across the globe.

data.title: Goodwill NYNJ introduces PACE program in Queens to aid adults in achieving sustained employment success.
data.description: In Queens, New York, on October 3, 2025, Goodwill Industries of Greater New York and Northern New Jersey (Goodwill NYNJ) revealed their new PACE (Partnership for Advancement and Career Enhancement) program aimed at assisting adults in securing sustainable employment. This program builds upon the organization's successful track record spanning two decades. Goodwill NYNJ's initiative aims to enhance job prospects for individuals within the community by providing tailored support, equipping them with necessary skills and resources. The PACE program's launch signifies a significant step forward in aiding individuals in attaining long-term employment security.

data.title: Strata Skin Sciences' XTRAC® Excimer Laser validated as breakthrough therapy for localized eczema; AMA expands indications for treatment.
data.description: In Horsham, Pennsylvania on October 3, 2025, STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: SSKN) commemorated Eczema Awareness Month by emphasizing the vast peer-reviewed clinical evidence endorsing the XTRAC ® Excimer Laser (308 nm) as a secure and highly efficient therapy for localized atopic dermatitis, the prevalent eczema type. This acknowledgment coincides with the American Medical Association (AMA) broadening excimer laser’s usage to inflammatory and autoimmune skin diseases, facilitating Medicare, Medicaid, and private insurer coverage for treating atopic dermatitis.

data.title: Investors in Savara from March 7, 2024 to May 23, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for claims, losses discussed.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP urges investors facing losses in Savara to contact him directly. If you bought Savara securities between March 7, 2024, and May 23, 2025, and wish to explore options, reach out to him for assistance.

data.title: Liguori Academy's Boundless Celebration on Oct. 30 in Philadelphia will feature legendary band Earth, Wind & Fire.
data.description: Liguori Academy in Philadelphia has revealed the launch of their upcoming Boundless Celebration event on October 30th at Vie by Cescaphe. The event promises an extraordinary evening filled with music, community engagement, and making a difference. This year's celebration is anticipated to attract a significant crowd and will bring together individuals looking to support a good cause.

data.title: Shutdown leads to missing September job data, but Fed expected to cut rates by 25 basis points. Delay marks first in 30 years.
data.description: The Federal Reserve is expected to cut interest rates by 25 basis points at its October 30 meeting, despite missing labor market updates due to the ongoing government shutdown. The Bureau of Labor Statistics did not release the September Employment Situation report, marking the first such delay in almost 30 years. During previous government shutdowns, the BLS managed to deliver employment data on time. For instance, during the 35-day shutdown under President Trump in 2018-2019, the BLS released the December Employment Situation report on time, and a similar scenario occurred during the 2013 shutdown under President Obama. The last time the BLS delayed a jobs report was during the government shutdown of January 1996.

data.title: Canadian General Investments reports unaudited NAV at $80.47/share on Sep 30, 2025, with YTD and 12-month returns at 17.4% and 25.0%. Benchmark S&P/TSX Index had 23.9% and 28.6% returns.
data.description: In Toronto, Canada, on October 3, 2025, Canadian General Investments, Limited (CGI) (TSX: CGI) (LSE: CGI) disclosed that its unaudited net asset value per share (NAV) as of September 30, 2025, stood at $80.47. This resulted in year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns, including dividend reinvestment, of 17.4% and 25.0%, respectively. These figures are in comparison to the S&P/TSX Composite Index's returns of 23.9% and 28.6% for the same periods.

data.title: Global holographic display market to grow from USD 14.30 billion in 2025 to USD 75.62 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 18.11%.
data.description: A report on the holographic display market trends and forecasts until 2035 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global holographic display market is projected to increase from USD 14.30 billion in 2025 to USD 75.62 billion by 2035, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18.11% during this period. The market encompasses various types of displays and is categorized based on the type of offering, areas of application, technology, enterprise, and key geographical regions.

data.title: In Q3, stablecoins attracted $46 billion, with USDT, USDC, and USDe leading the pack. Watch for market trends.
data.description: In the third quarter of the year, the net supply of stablecoins saw a significant increase of $46 billion. This growth was primarily driven by popular stablecoins such as USDT, USDC, and USDe. During this period, it is important to analyze which stablecoins saw a gain in market share, track the movement of funds, and pay attention to key indicators for potential future developments in the stablecoin market.
